title: Harmonic
subtitle: VOS360 — broadcast-grade SaaS for media operators

steps.label: What They Do
steps.body:
Harmonic (NASDAQ: HLIT) is the worldwide leader in virtualized video and broadband. Their VOS360 SaaS platform covers the full broadcast media chain:

- VOS360 Media SaaS — playout, encoding, packaging, origin, nPVR
- VOS360 Ad SaaS — full personalised ad insertion workflow

AI features include automatic SCTE-35 marker insertion, sports clipping, automated subtitles, voice-cloned translation.

steps.label: How They Run on Akamai
steps.body:
Both VOS360 Media SaaS and VOS360 Ad SaaS are qualified on Akamai Connected Cloud. Critically, VOS360 Media powers Akamai Media Services Live 5 (MSL5) — the next-gen suite for 24/7 live linear streaming.

Harmonic supports a hybrid model: keep encoding on-prem (fixed cost), move storage, DVR, and origin to the cloud (variable, elastic). Akamai Object Storage is the natural archive tier for cloud nPVR — cheap long-term retention without hyperscaler egress.

steps.label: When To Position
steps.body: Traditional broadcasters and pay-TV operators with on-prem playout who want a hybrid path to cloud. Harmonic's history with broadcast workflows (DOCSIS, vCMTS, virtualized broadband) gives them deep credibility with the operations side of broadcast IT — they're not a streaming-only newcomer.
"Harmonic VOS360 = broadcast operations as SaaS on Akamai. Powers MSL5. Hybrid (on-prem + cloud) is a first-class deployment model."

quiz.question: What's the strategic significance of Harmonic VOS360 powering Akamai Media Services Live 5?

options.text: It's the new default origin for all Akamai customers
options.explain: It powers MSL5 specifically, not all customers.

options.text: VOS360 is the engine behind Akamai's next-gen 24/7 live linear streaming product
options.explain: MSL5 is Akamai's media services suite for live event broadcasting and linear streaming. Harmonic's VOS360 Media SaaS powers it.
It coexists with Ateme, Bitmovin, and others.
MSL5 is specifically about live linear, not VOD.

quiz.question: A pay-TV operator has on-prem playout but wants long-term archive in the cloud (nPVR). What's the Harmonic hybrid pattern?

options.explain: Harmonic's explicit story is hybrid — fixed costs stay on-prem, variable costs go to cloud.

options.text: Keep encoding on-prem (fixed cost), move nPVR archive to Akamai Object Storage (variable cost, elastic)
options.explain: Exactly the hybrid story Harmonic positions. nPVR has unpredictable retention growth — cloud elasticity wins.

options.text: Run nPVR on a single Linode
options.explain: Object Storage is the right tier — Linodes are compute, not archival storage.
Block Storage is for active filesystem workloads. Object Storage scales to PB cheaply.
